HOME GALLERY ABOUT CONTACT

DREW FLOYD

I specialize in sports photography and videography, with experience shooting fast-paced athletic events and structured media day content. My work emphasizes timing, composition, and motion capture, particularly in track and field environments. I use Adobe Lightroom for photo editing and Final Cut Pro for video production, managing color correction, sequencing, and final delivery. I focus on creating content that is both visually strong and story-driven.

"Become Undeniable"
- Adam Scott

EXPERIENCE & CAPABILITIES

  • Sports Photography & Videography
  • Chapman University Athletics Coverage
  • Lightroom Color Grading & Visuals
  • Final Cut Pro Video Editing & Sequencing
